title: Gravity Grid
description: Makes each chunk have a different gravity direction
body: ## Support Me ![Youtube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17d4ca87909921fd4a897b652282fc1382b6a33b.png) ![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bee352562b9baf12d465b3ffe6d7535cad7e753c.png) ![Twitter/X](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4e66b2b5b4df295e42bb2ed98b024c6005efe19.png) ## This mod was made for this video: ## Dependencies Required: [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config), [Magicalbananapi's 1.21.1 Gravity Changer fork](https://modrinth.com/mod/gravitychanger-(banana-fork)) Optional: [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) (but recommended for accessing mod config) ## Information this is a fabric mod that only works on 1.21.1. it assigns different gravity directions to each chunk when your world generates using the gravity changer api mod, making for an interesting minecraft challenge. you can enable/disable this "gravity grid" with the custom gravityGridEnabled gamerule, and you can also configure a hud element that shows the gravity direction on your screen in the mod config settings. ## Public Usage if you'd like to use assets/modified versions of this mod in your own projects and publicly share them, credit me and link this page or my YouTube video. - **as long as you credit me,** you may use this mod or assets from this mod in your own public social media posts, mod packs, resource packs, and bedrock ports - **please do not** create new showcase webpages, download links, or claim credit for making this mod or assets from this mod. - **if you are unsure,** message me on discord (L33tfox) for permission
